description.value:
Prerequisite: Know at least 4 techniques.

Benefit: You get a 'Licensed' license in your Ninja village, a +1 Wealth bonus and a +1 bonus to one of the following: Chakra Control, Gather Information, Genjutsu, Hide, Investigate, Move Silently, Ninjutsu or Taijutsu. You may substitute the skill bonus for the Sense Chakra (p11) or Suppress Chakra (p11) ability. Gaining this feat does not grant you the Genin title, and getting the title does not grant you this feat.
